sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-02-22 06:01
- Distance: 10.1 km
- Moving time: 1:00:21
- Elapsed time: 1:00:21
- Elevation gain: 86.2 m
- Average heart rate: 170.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 185 bpm
- Average watts: 191.2 W
- Average speed: 10.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.6 bpm`, ranging from `160.7` to `180.3 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `164.0 bpm` and second-half average HR was `177.2 bpm` (+13.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `160.5 spm`, with a working range of `150.0` to `162.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `161.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `160.0 spm` (-1.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:58 /km` across `10.117 km` in `1:00:21` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:07 /km` and second-half pace was `5:49 /km` (-18 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `170.1 bpm` average and `185 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `163.9 bpm` in the first half and `176.5 bpm` in the second (+12.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:00:21` out of `1:00:21` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `2` stop segments and `0.2%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `115.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.8 m` and `19.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `49.2 m` in the first half and `65.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
